title: Add procedure embedded spec runner (mock + integration)

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation for Procedure spec runner in Plexus: service-level runner, CLI command, MCP tool, and tests. Default mode will be mock; integration mode explicit.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented procedure embedded spec runner:
- Added ProcedureService.test_procedure_specs to load YAML (from procedure ID or inline YAML), validate Tactus code, require embedded Specification blocks, execute via TactusTestRunner in mock/integration mode, and return structured summary plus scenario/step details.
- Added CLI command: plexus procedure test-specs with --mode, --scenario, --no-parallel, --workers, and output formats table/json/yaml.
- Added MCP tool: plexus_procedure_test_specs with exact-one-of input validation (procedure_id xor yaml_config).
- Added tests for service, CLI, and MCP, including acceptance checks for plexus/procedures/scorecard_create.yaml and plexus/procedures/score_code_create.yaml in mock mode.
Validation run:
- pytest -q plexus/cli/procedure/test_spec_runner_service.py plexus/cli/procedure/test_procedure_test_specs_cli.py MCP/tools/procedure/procedures_test.py => 24 passed
- black --check on modified files => pass
- ruff check on new/updated test files => pass

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Re-validated after cleanup:
- pytest targeted suite: 24 passed
- black --check on new/updated spec-runner test files: pass
- ruff check on new/updated spec-runner test files: pass
Implementation files currently include only focused deltas (service + CLI + MCP + tests), without broad formatter churn.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Opened PR to `dev` with semantic-release note: https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/pull/116
Commit: 6a489fd1
Branch: feature/tactus-procedure
PR title: feat(procedure): run embedded Tactus specs from procedure records

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Resolved PR conflicts by merging latest `origin/dev` into `feature/tactus-procedure` (merge commit `75ba190f`) and pushed branch. Re-ran targeted suite: 24 passed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Addressed CI failures on PR #116:
- Fixed guidelines validator module lookup to support `skills/plexus-guidelines/...` (with fallback to legacy `.claude/skills/...`).
- Committed updated `plexus/procedures/scorecard_create.yaml` (removed deprecated `.turn()` calls via callable agent syntax).
- Added missing `plexus/procedures/score_code_create.yaml` required by spec-runner acceptance tests.

Local verification for failing set:
- `pytest -q MCP/tools/score/guidelines_test.py`
- `pytest -q plexus/cli/procedure/test_spec_runner_service.py::test_acceptance_procedure_specs_pass_in_mock_mode[plexus/procedures/scorecard_create.yaml]`
- `pytest -q plexus/cli/procedure/test_spec_runner_service.py::test_acceptance_procedure_specs_pass_in_mock_mode[plexus/procedures/score_code_create.yaml]`
=> 6 passed

Pushed commit `89a3a4f6` to `feature/tactus-procedure`; CI re-running on PR #116.
